Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Continued To Sep-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roberta Simi for and with Annemarie Hasler.

There being no objection, the Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
